CustomField.formula:
IF(!ISBLANK(Image_1_URL__c), "1. "+ HYPERLINK(Image_1_URL__c + $Organization.Id, IMAGE(Image_1_URL__c + $Organization.Id , "",(VALUE(LEFT(Image_1_Ratio__c, FIND("X", Image_1_Ratio__c) - 1)) * 0.5),(VALUE(RIGHT(Image_1_Ratio__c, LEN(Image_1_Ratio__c) - FIND("X", Image_1_Ratio__c))))* 0.5),"_self"),"")+
IF(!ISBLANK(Image_2_URL__c), " 2. "+ HYPERLINK(Image_2_URL__c + $Organization.Id, " " + IMAGE(Image_2_URL__c + $Organization.Id, "",(VALUE(LEFT(Image_2_Ratio__c, FIND("X", Image_2_Ratio__c) - 1)) * 0.5),(VALUE(RIGHT(Image_2_Ratio__c, LEN(Image_2_Ratio__c) - FIND("X", Image_2_Ratio__c))))* 0.5),"_parent"),"")+
IF(ISBLANK(Image_1_URL__c)&&ISBLANK(Image_2_URL__c)&&ISBLANK(Image_3_URL__c)&&ISBLANK(Image_4_URL__c), IMAGE("/resource/Impact_Icons/NoPhoto.png", "" , 100,100), "")
CustomField.label: Images
